allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:9002/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""topic"": ""어린이날 행사 장소""}' -o /tmp/step1.json -w "HTTP %{http_code} | Time: %{time_total}s\\n")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''/tmp/step1.json''\); console.log\(''slug:'', d.slug || ''ERROR:''+d.error?.slice\(0,100\)\); console.log\(''pages:'', d.pages?.length || 0\);")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:9002/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""topic"": ""전국 캠핑장 추천""}' -o /tmp/camp_step1.json -w "HTTP %{http_code} | %{time_total}s\\n")
